@graph.name: MGnify's amplicon pipeline v5.0 - ITS
@graph.description:
Classification and visualization of ITS regions.

## Associated Tutorial

This workflows is part of the tutorial [MGnify v5.0 Amplicon Pipeline](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/topics/microbiome/tutorials/mgnify-amplicon/tutorial.html), available in the [GTN](https://training.galaxyproject.org)

## Features

* Includes a [Galaxy Workflow Report](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/galaxy/workflows_report_view.html)
* Uses [subworkflows](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/galaxy/workflows_subworkflows.html)
